message:
test(cache): add proptest harness for interleaved dual-index operations

Two new property tests in proptest_cache module:
- prop_interleaved_ops_dual_index_coherent: 500 cases of random
  put/invalidate/touch/get sequences with stable (name,project)→id
  mapping, asserting by_key and by_id indexes never contradict.
- prop_interleaved_ops_no_panic_under_eviction: 500 cases with
  capacity=8 forcing heavy S3-FIFO eviction, asserting no panics
  and capacity bounds respected.

Ref: br-pf84h

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
